metadata.description: KB Factory plugins for governed knowledge workflows across Claude Code and Claude Cowork.

plugins.description: CASE-compatible KB lifecycle and wiki maintenance plugin. Use when a project has a `.kb/` directory and needs session bootstrap, source ingestion, or wiki refresh.
plugins.name: kb-lifecycle

plugins.description: Thin session-boundary wrapper for Claude environments. Provides explicit gate-session-start and gate-session-end commands that route to detected KB/Wiki surfaces without generic command collisions.
plugins.name: session-gate

plugins.description: KB/Wiki vNext thin-memory harness for Claude Code and Cowork. Uses vnext-session-start, loads only .kb-next/memory/NOW.md by default, and keeps .kb canonical.
plugins.name: kb-wiki-vnext
